candidate_missing_primitives: Align — the catchball negotiation process (bidirectional commitment-building across organizational levels) is not fully captured by Communicate alone; a dedicated alignment or negotiate primitive would better represent this interaction
ambiguities: Communicate covers both top-down deployment and bottom-up catchball feedback, which are structurally distinct interactions; a single primitive may underspecify this bidirectionality
Verify conflates progress tracking (periodic review cadence) with breakthrough review (president's diagnosis); these may warrant separate primitive instances or a sub-classification
notes: The artifact is a well-known Japanese strategic planning and execution methodology. The core loop is annual with nested quarterly and monthly review sub-cycles. The Reassess node is the methodologically critical junction — it can return flow to Bound (full objective reset) or Prioritize (tactical recalibration), making it both an exit and a branch point. Coordinate is marked dominant because cross-level alignment is the defining structural feature distinguishing this artifact from simpler planning frameworks.
